top3.sql:
SELECT SUM(posts.Score) AS total_score, users.WebsiteUrl
FROM posts
JOIN users ON posts.LastEditorUserId = users.Id
WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny'
GROUP BY users.WebsiteUrl;

SELECT SUM(p.Score) AS TotalScore, u.WebsiteUrl
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny'
GROUP BY u.WebsiteUrl;

SELECT SUM(posts.Score) AS total_score, users.WebsiteUrl
FROM posts
JOIN users ON posts.LastEditorUserId = users.Id
WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny'
GROUP BY users.WebsiteUrl;

SELECT SUM(p.Score) AS TotalScore, u.WebsiteUrl
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName LIKE '%Yevgeny%'
GROUP BY u.WebsiteUrl;

GROUP BY u.WebsiteUrl;

final.sql:
SELECT SUM(posts.Score) AS total_score, users.WebsiteUrl
FROM posts
JOIN users ON posts.LastEditorUserId = users.Id
WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny'
GROUP BY users.WebsiteUrl;
